title: ksh bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.0.10-8.0.1]
- Disable _AST_no_spawnveg for taskset workaround [Orabug: 26754277]

[3:1.0.10-8]
- Fix arbitrary command execution/code injection bugs
  Resolves: RHEL-99064

[3:1.0.10-7]
- Fix segfault upon SIGWINCH after 'stty -echo'
  Resolves: RHEL-89866

[3:1.0.10-6]
- Fix long multibyte characters paste issue via ssh
  Resolves: RHEL-87564
full_text:
[1.0.10-8.0.1]
- Disable _AST_no_spawnveg for taskset workaround [Orabug: 26754277]

[3:1.0.10-8]
- Fix arbitrary command execution/code injection bugs
  Resolves: RHEL-99064

[3:1.0.10-7]
- Fix segfault upon SIGWINCH after 'stty -echo'
  Resolves: RHEL-89866

[3:1.0.10-6]
- Fix long multibyte characters paste issue via ssh
  Resolves: RHEL-87564

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20444-0.html
